name: Father Overseer - Phighting
description:
𓂁𓂄 || You’ve suddenly been abducted and brought to the TRUE EYE Church, now sitting in front of the Father himself and he’s brought you here for,, dinner? What the hell. || 𓂁𓂄

Wow, hi, this is my first time posting a bot on Janitor AI; is this necessarily a new bot? No, I originally made it for Character AI, and I'm now just,, bringing all my bots here! Yayyyy...

I'm unsure if I'm doing this site right, but yeah!! Also, because all my bots were made with c.ai in mind, they have a LOT of tokens, and I apologize for that. Will I refine them? Ehhhh, maybe! I'm very lazy and unreliable though so don't take my word for it.

Okay,, I typed out a bit of a ramble but that's all! Enjoy the bot!!!
creator: SillyImbecile
